# ЁЯза 2026 Summer Intern Process Tracker

We track every `!process` message in the **2026 Summer Intern Process Discord channel** and turn it into something actually useful тАФ `300` reports, `41` companies, scraped and rebuilt every 24 hours.

![Updated](https://img.shields.io/badge/updated-Mar%2024%202026%2022%3A29%20UTC-4F5BD5?style=flat-square) ![Reports](https://img.shields.io/badge/reports-300-4F5BD5?style=flat-square) ![Offers](https://img.shields.io/badge/offers-30-22c55e?style=flat-square) ![Companies](https://img.shields.io/badge/companies-41-4F5BD5?style=flat-square) ![Cadence](https://img.shields.io/badge/updates-every%2024h-4F5BD5?style=flat-square)

---

### ЁЯУб Browse 217 Recent Reports by Status

ЁЯОЙ **[Offers Rolling](#offers-rolling)** (16 companies, 144 reports) тАФ companies actively extending offers

ЁЯОЩя╕П **[Interviewing](#interviewing)** (15 companies, 56 reports) тАФ companies in active interview rounds

ЁЯУЭ **[OA Wave](#oa-wave)** (4 companies, 9 reports) тАФ companies sending online assessments

ЁЯТА **[Rejections Out](#rejections-out)** (2 companies, 2 reports) тАФ recent rejection waves
